programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Storytellers share how they found and repurposed a beach cottage on Nantucket Island, a formerly dilapidated motor lodge in downtown Raleigh, North Carolina, and a 1907 hospital in Washington, North Carolina.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Storytellers share how they found and transformed a beachside cottage in New York, a rundown 1960s motel in Massachusetts and a former Jewish synagogue in South Carolina.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Storytellers reveal how they found and transformed an old, abandoned bank in Detroit, a seaside cottage on Cape Cod and a medieval-themed lodge in San Luis Obispo, California.

programme.title: Back to the Frontier
programme.desc: As tensions rise between the Lopers and Halls after an auction, the Hall sisters decide to host an ice cream social for the frontier families.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: With their children grown, a couple agrees it's time to downsize their home as they enter retirement; priorities include a large kitchen, a nice living space and the right location.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Andrew and Brittany are first-time buyers; they're looking for a home with plenty of space for their beloved pooches.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: San Diego transplants Mary and Dustyn are on the hunt for their family's dream home in Waco, Texas, and they're looking for a four-bedroom with a large yard and open space for hosting.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna have the challenge of designing a living space that is move-in ready within two months for friend, fellow designer and impending mother Kristen Bufton.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a half-finished Victorian mansion in the Historic District that was too good to pass up.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Seeing potential in forgotten historic spaces, city homeowners stretched their creativity and modernized historic residences for family living in New Orleans, London, and Chicago.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Ambitious homeowners tackle the challenge of transforming unusual structures into thoughtfully designed family homes--from a converted cowshed in the English countryside to an abandoned church in New York and an old mechanic shop in London.

programme.title: Anything but Gray
programme.desc: Gray, Grumpy and Chelcie help a retired couple revive a 1915 home in a historic waterfront neighborhood; they design with the home's history in mind, including a kitchen reno, eccentric wallpaper and bold colors to delight their grandkids.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael jump at the chance to restore an 1866 Victorian designed by famed Galveston architect Nicholas Clayton. At 3,500 square feet, they face a massive undertaking to honor the home's historical integrity while staying within budget.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take a gamble on a 1979 property as old homes become harder to find in a saturated market—with fewer historical details to honor, they must get creative with their designs.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael buy a shack from 1898 that's been abandoned for decades; with multiple problems, a tight budget and their second baby on the way, they face big challenges to transform it into a neighborhood gem.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays turn an alley home once filled with cats into a getaway; this Galveston gem is highlighted with custom features including reclaimed wood walls and an upcycled stock tank bathtub.

programme.title: In With the Old
programme.sub-title: New Britain, CT: The Gad Stanley House
programme.desc: A couple lovingly restores a historic home in picturesque New England.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Seeing potential in forgotten historic spaces, city homeowners stretched their creativity and modernized historic residences for family living in New Orleans, London, and Chicago.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Ambitious homeowners tackle the challenge of transforming unusual structures into thoughtfully designed family homes--from a converted cowshed in the English countryside to an abandoned church in New York and an old mechanic shop in London.

programme.title: Anything but Gray
programme.desc: Gray, Grumpy and Chelcie help a retired couple revive a 1915 home in a historic waterfront neighborhood; they design with the home's history in mind, including a kitchen reno, eccentric wallpaper and bold colors to delight their grandkids.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: From the rocky shores of a Scottish Loch to the striking coasts of Oregon and California, homeowners with unique tastes cultivate their own nature-inspired havens to live out their escapist dreams.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: From stunning, tropical rural land in Mexico, to a dreamy northern lake in Maine and historic land in arid Puglia, Italy, homeowners with a unique eye for art, architecture, and history have meticulously crafted unique family homes.

programme.title: Anything but Gray
programme.desc: Gray, Grumpy and Chelcie help a retired couple revive a 1915 home in a historic waterfront neighborhood; they design with the home's history in mind, including a kitchen reno, eccentric wallpaper and bold colors to delight their grandkids.

programme.desc: Anna and Elliott are buying a second home with a dream view of Big Sur's iconic cliffs and crashing waves.

programme.title: For the Love of Kitchens
programme.desc: While visiting their New York showroom, Paul and Helen help a family create an elegant kitchen in their new apartment with a design inspired by the coastline of Liz's hometown in the U.K.; back at Cotes Mill, Robin makes a brand new drawer handle.

programme.title: Motel Rescue
programme.desc: In Avon, North Carolina, a father and son need help turning their motel around; Lindsey needs to teach the duo some tricks of the trade, old and new, to ensure this generational family-owned motel thrives.

programme.title: Motel Rescue
programme.desc: In Carolina Beach, North Carolina, Lindsey must help an owner bounce back from burnout after a hurricane wreaked havoc on her motel and her spirit; it will take a bold design and some creative business ideas to reinvigorate this beachside motel.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Longtime Friends Give a Lake House New Life in South Carolina
programme.desc: A decades long friendship explores uncharted waters when an agent helps her longtime friend buy and renovate a lake home; they've made countless memories on Lake Hartwell, so it's only fitting that's where he's looking to find his forever home.
